author: Rahul M.
content: After regular sessions, I noticed less shedding and my routine became much more consistent.

author: Priya S.
content: The multiple electrodes made it easy to use on scalp and face without changing my whole schedule.

author: Arjun K.
content: Simple to use daily and it made applying oils and serum much more effective for me.

author: Neha R.
content: The helmet fits comfortably and the 20-minute sessions are easy to stick with three times a week.

author: Vikram P.
content: Good build quality on the wand. Scalp sessions feel refreshing and my serum absorbs better.

author: Ananya T.
content: Waterproof massager works great in the shower. Gentle on my sensitive scalp.
